tagline: Bilingual Web3 PM interview preparation skill for wallet, DeFi, on-chain data, and AI Wallet roles
description:
Web3 PM Interview Skill helps candidates prepare for product manager interviews across wallets, exchanges, DeFi, DEX, on-chain data, growth, AI Wallet, Agentic Wallet, Senior PM, Product Lead, and Product Director roles.

## Why
Most Web3 PM candidates do not fail because they know nothing about crypto. They fail because they cannot translate their past experience into the target role's hiring model, turn a JD into the real interview checks, or convert Web3 concepts into product, business, data, and risk judgment.

## What it does
- JD teardown and candidate-role fit diagnosis
- Interview positioning and self-introduction
- Round-specific preparation for HR, hiring manager, cross-functional, final, bar raiser, and offer conversations
- Wallet / DeFi / on-chain data / AI Wallet domain prep
- High-probability interview questions and answer frames
- Mock interview scoring and stronger answer rewrites
- Case interview and 30/60/90-day planning
- Privacy-safe anonymized examples

## How to use
Paste your resume or 5-bullet background, target JD, company, interview stage, and time left before the interview. The skill will guide you into one of five modes: quick JD diagnosis, full interview battle plan, mock interview review, case prep, or post-interview debrief.

## Privacy
This skill does not require network access, local file access, or external services. It is designed to preserve method while removing private details. Do not publish raw interview recordings, private recruiter messages, compensation details, named interviewer analysis, internal metrics, or non-public company information.
